scripts.build: bun run clean && tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/provider-chatgpt/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.pack:dry-run: bun run build && (cd packages/core && npm pack --dry-run --json) && (cd packages/provider-chatgpt && npm pack --dry-run --json) && (cd packages/cli && npm pack --dry-run --json)
scripts.publish:packages: bun run check && bun run lint && (cd packages/core && npm publish --access public) && (cd packages/provider-chatgpt && npm publish --access public) && (cd packages/cli && npm publish --access public)
